page.title: Control de calidad
page.subtitle: Puntajes de catación, clasificación de defectos y el QC-HOLD que impide vender un lote con fallas

cupPage.title: Catación {lot}
cupPage.subtitle: Califica la taza — y ve exactamente qué la produjo

statusTable.title: Quality control
statusTable.description: Cup scores, green-grading defects, and the QC-HOLD quarantine — a held lot is physically un-sellable until released
statusTable.emptyTitle: No green lots to QC yet
statusTable.emptyDescription: Grade a finished lot in Inventory to mint a green lot you can cup, grade for defects, and hold.

cupperDrift.title: Calibración de deriva de catadores
cupperDrift.description: El sesgo de cada catador/a frente a la media del panel en muestras de calibración compartidas — evidencia para corregir, nunca un puntaje rechazado
cupperDrift.emptyTitle: Aún no hay sesiones de calibración
cupperDrift.emptyDescription: Cata una muestra de calibración compartida con dos o más catadores para que el sesgo sistemático aparezca aquí.

holdControl.title: Place QC-hold
holdControl.lockNote: A held lot cannot be reserved or shipped until released — enforced in the database, not just here.
holdControl.errorFallback: Couldn't complete that — please try again.
holdControl.errorDuplicate: That hold was already recorded — refresh and try again.
holdControl.errorLocked: This QC record is locked and can't be changed.

defectForm.title: Green-grading defects
defectForm.descriptionTail: — primary are disqualifying, secondary are quality
defectForm.recorded: Defect recorded — bound to this lot forever.
defectForm.noDefects: No green-grading defects logged for this lot yet.

scoresheet.title: Cupping scoresheet
scoresheet.descriptionLead: · score each attribute 0–10 — the total mirrors the server's
scoresheet.cupRecorded: Cup recorded — bound to this lot forever.

cupToCause.title: Cup-to-cause
cupToCause.emptyDescription: This lot's farm-to-green genealogy isn't available yet — the score still binds to the lot, and the cause fills in as ferment and drying are logged.
